description: A separator lattice partitions the grid into repeated cells. Fill missing cell motifs by copying or completing the pattern across the lattice. Confidence is medium because source-cell selection is not fully explicit.
arcDslCode:

    x1 = height(I)
    x2 = mostcolor(I)

    x4 = subtract(x1, TWO)

    x6 = astuple(x5, x5)
    x7 = crop(I, ORIGIN, x6)
    x8 = partition(x7)
    x9 = matcher(color, ZERO)
    x10 = compose(flip, x9)
    x11 = extract(x8, x10)
    x12 = initset(x2)

    x18 = interval(ZERO, THREE, ONE)
    x19 = product(x18, x18)
    x20 = totuple(x19)
    x21 = apply(first, x20)
    x22 = apply(last, x20)
    x23 = lbind(multiply, x5)

    x27 = papply(add, x25, x22)
    x28 = papply(astuple, x26, x27)
    x29 = lbind(shift, x11)
    x30 = mapply(x29, x28)
    O = underfill(I, x17, x30)
